title: Senior Business Development Manager at Lodha Group Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Lodha Group Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group Digital Technologies:
Lodha Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
